name: @activepieces/retro-bundle
description: Path-2 retro-bundling pipeline — re-bundle published piece versions with their own pinned deps and pre-seed them as S3 bundles. Runs/tests fully local (no S3) by default.

scripts.gen-targets: node targets/target-list.cjs && node targets/emit-flat.cjs && node targets/emit-links-csv.cjs

note: Uses the monorepo's esbuild + a global `bun`. Run `npm install` (or `bun install`) at the repo root once so esbuild resolves from the hoisted node_modules.
